utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: He is a keeper . How are you feeling ?

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Can I just say , I really admire what you are doing . Just raising her all alone .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Oh , I am not doing it alone . I have Ross .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh , sure . Now . But what happens when he meets somebody else and gets married ?

emotion_cause.span: 5_what happens when he meets somebody else and gets married ?

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well then he gets a divorce , it is Ross !

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: I am telling you Rachel , listen to Janice . They all say they are gonna be there until they start their real family .

emotion_cause.span: 7_They all say they are gonna be there until they start their real family .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Well I ... That is never gonna happen with Ross .

emotion_cause.span: 7_They all say they are gonna be there until they start their real family .

utterances.speaker: Janice
utterances.text: Oh well that is what I thought about my first husband , now I am lucky if my kid gets to spend the weekend with her father and the twins and little Ms . New Boobs .

emotion_cause.span: 9_that is what I thought about my first husband , now I am lucky if my kid gets to spend the weekend with her father and the twins and little Ms . New Boobs .
